name: Popfeed
description: Sync Jellyfin watched and unwatched actions to Popfeed over ATProto. Supports per-user Popfeed account mappings, searchable exclusions, recent activity visibility, and dashboard-triggered dry-run testing.
overview: Sync Jellyfin watched state to Popfeed over ATProto

versions.changelog: - fix(sync): 🐛 enforce canonical episode routing
- feat(sync): ✨ reconcile full season and series watched state
- fix(recent): 🐛 keep tv_episode in review routing
- fix(watched): 🐛 backfill series episode progress
- fix(watched): 🐛 sync tv_show watchedEpisodes
- fix(popfeed): 🐛 restore episode links and watched sync
- ci(release): 👷 verify stable manifest publication
- fix(popfeed): 🐛 use episode type for watched compatibility
- fix(watched): 🐛 align listItem listType with list
- fix(popfeed): 🐛 emit tv_episode for list links
- fix(list): 🐛 replace canonical episode items
- fix(list): 🐛 force refresh canonical episode items
- fix(list): 🐛 dedupe stale episode list items
- fix(episode): 🐛 remove legacy identifier shape
- fix(url): 🐛 canonicalize legacy episode links

- fix(repair): 🐛 avoid deleting corrected list item
- fix(plugin): 🐛 harden stale folder cleanup on Windows
- fix(atproto): 🐛 honor 429 cooldown hints
- fix(plugin): 🐛 parse versioned plugin dirs with suffixes
- fix(repair): 🐛 prevent internal errors and match by identifiers
- fix(sync): 🐛 remove episode tmdbId in canonical writes
- feat(repair): ✨ add replay-only latest jellyfin mode
- fix(repair): 🐛 block delete when replay did not sync
- fix(plugin): 🐛 prevent self-cleanup on restart
- fix(repair): 🐛 repair and delete latest episode list-item activities
- fix(api): 🐛 disambiguate MetadataProvider enum in controller
- fix(repair): 🐛 retry on rate limits and defer deletes until replay succeeds
- fix(api): 🐛 pass user object to GetUserData overload
- feat(mediator): ✨ sync in-progress state on playback start/finish

- Fix Jellyfin compatibility metadata and target framework
- build: 🏗️ target net9.0 and Jellyfin 10.11 packages
- fix(api): 🐛 use GetUsers() instead of deprecated Users property

- refactor(sync): ♻️ clean up dead code, wrappers and unused params
- test(sync): ✅ fix URL builder test runtime deps

- refactor(sync): ♻️ unify Popfeed item URL builder into shared service
- test(sync): ✅ add regression for shared canonical episode URL
- fix(sync): 🐛 correct Popfeed item links

- build(release): 🏗️ derive manifest changelog from git history
- docs(agents): 📝 require approval before main merge

- Trigger sync on PlaybackFinished (watching a film/episode to completion) in addition to manual TogglePlayed toggles
- Fix Popfeed review URL in Bluesky posts (was posting a raw AT-URI, now posts the correct /profile/{handle}/review/{rkey} link)
- Fix activity text language: Popfeed review text now respects the configured Bluesky post language per user
- Fix watched timestamp timezone ambiguity: LastPlayedDate is now correctly treated as UTC
- Add native Popfeed watched-list (social.popfeed.feed.listItem) records alongside review records
- Upload and attach poster images to Popfeed review records
- Stale plugin directories are cleaned up automatically on startup/reinstall

- Initial Popfeed sync plugin release
- Added per-user Popfeed mappings
- Added searchable exclusion UI and dry-run test endpoint
- Added recent sync activity panel in the plugin settings page
- Added GitHub-release manifest generation for direct Jellyfin repository install
